_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model adoption, fine-tuning pipeline integrity, third-party dataset provenance, and model registry security controls.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-011 (RM, cosine: 0.544), DQ-K-016 (DQ, cosine: 0.514).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.584). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, security, supply]. DCWF-only terms [apply, elements, functionality, i, items, processes] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, chain, controls, dataset, fine, integrity] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.860, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these wil" and "Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.570 ≈ STS 0.584 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, security, supply] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, security, supply]. DCWF-only: [apply, elements, functionality, i, items, processes]. WIDAI-only: [adoption, chain, controls, dataset, fine, integrity].
